{{CargoRelic
|name=Ball of Monkey Fur
|class_id=20835
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Monkey fur of unknown origin, with a sour scent, conceals a note: I've taken care of this trouble for you. See you later, Earth's Will. Stay honest, and don't be too hot-headed, young one…
|fame=13
|art=17
|fth=13
|civ=14
|tech=33
|ss1=Per Monkey Prayer Bonus claimed, Snail DEF +3<br>Monkey Prayer Bonus Claimed: 20/20
|ss2=Per Monkey Prayer Bonus claimed, Snail DEF +4<br>Monkey Prayer Bonus Claimed: 20/20
|ss3=Per Monkey Prayer Bonus claimed, Snail DEF +5<br>Monkey Prayer Bonus Claimed: 20/20
|ss4=Per Monkey Prayer Bonus claimed, Snail DEF +5<br>Monkey Prayer Bonus Claimed: 20/20
|ss7=Per Monkey Prayer Bonus claimed, Snail DEF +5<br>Monkey Prayer Bonus Claimed: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
